title: Mild Nutty Indian Almonds Thali
description: A lazy-sunday thali featuring lightly seasoned roasted almonds with galangal-kha and poached veggies in a low-sodium broth.
instructions: Preheat oven to 180C and spread almonds on a baking sheet.
Toss almonds with olive oil, galangal-kha powder, and roasted cumin seeds.
Roast almonds for 12 minutes, stirring halfway, until golden and fragrant.
While almonds roast, bring vegetable broth to a gentle simmer in a small saucepan.
Add minced garlic, grated ginger, and chopped carrot slices to the broth.
Cover and let the mixture poach for 8 minutes, or until carrots are tender but still crisp.
Add cauliflower florets to the pot and continue poaching for another 5 minutes.
Once cooked, drain the vegetables and return them to the saucepan, seasoning with low-sodium soy sauce.
Transfer the poached vegetable medley to a serving bowl and top with roasted almonds.
Garnish with fresh cilantro and a sprinkle of salt if desired, then serve immediately.
